name: ACE Cash Express - ATM
description_short: ACE Cash Express in Indianapolis offers check cashing, payday loans, money transfers, and ATM services at their E Washington St location with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates a physical storefront location in Indianapolis, Indiana at 8975 E Washington St Ste 101, serving the local community with multiple financial services. The company has been in the check-cashing and short-term lending business, providing accessible financial solutions to customers who may lack traditional banking relationships or need immediate cash access. Their Indianapolis location is open Monday-Thursday 10 AM-7 PM, Friday 10 AM-8 PM, and Saturday 10 AM-6 PM, offering extended evening hours for working customers. The company positions itself as a one-stop financial services shop rather than a traditional bank.

ACE Cash Express offers a diverse range of money services including check cashing (requiring only valid government-issued ID and no bank account), payday loans ranging from $100-$825, bill payment services for rent and utilities, MoneyGram money transfers to over 200 countries, money orders, ATM services with cash withdrawal and card loading capabilities, and tax refund check cashing. They also provide prepaid card products including the ACE Elite Visa Card, Flare Account online banking, and Porte accounts with mobile banking apps. These card products are issued through Pathward National Association and FDIC-insured. Personal loans and business services are additionally listed among their offerings.

ACE Cash Express distinguishes itself through no-account-required check cashing, extended operating hours including Friday evenings until 8 PM, partnerships with established financial service providers like MoneyGram and Pathward for banking products, and in-person support for card product management. The location serves as a physical service point where customers can handle multiple financial transactions in one visit, from bill payments to money transfers to ATM access. Their prepaid card products include integrated mobile banking functionality, modernizing traditional check-cashing store services.

The primary caveat is that while ACE offers accessible short-term lending and check-cashing services, payday loans carry regulatory implications and may represent an expensive borrowing option compared to traditional credit. The company operates in a highly regulated industry with state-specific lending laws. While they provide legitimate financial services, customers should understand the terms and costs associated with payday products. The store's Sunday closure and limited Saturday hours may inconvenience some customers, and their service model relies on customers visiting a physical location rather than fully digital banking.
pros: No bank account required for check cashing—only valid government-issued ID needed
Extended weekday hours until 8 PM on Fridays accommodates working customers
MoneyGram partnership enables money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Payday loans available in-store up to $825 for unexpected expenses
FDIC-insured banking products (Porte, Flare Account) issued through Pathward National Association
One-stop financial services including bill pay, money orders, tax refund cashing, and ATM access
ACE Elite Visa prepaid card with in-person support for cash loading and withdrawals
cons: Payday loans ($100-$825) are short-term, high-cost borrowing products with regulatory limitations and potential debt cycle risk
Limited weekend accessibility—closed Sundays and Saturday hours end at 6 PM, restricting access for some customers
Physical location dependency means customers cannot access all services remotely; no fully digital alternative offered
Check cashing and money services typically carry per-transaction fees not detailed on this landing page
Prepaid card products require registration, ID verification, and terms/fees that are not fully disclosed on the website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked customers needing check cashing without a bank account
Indianapolis residents needing quick access to cash or emergency small-dollar loans
Customers sending international money transfers or paying bills in cash
Individuals seeking FDIC-insured prepaid banking alternatives with in-person support
diagnosis: This Indianapolis ACE Cash Express location is best for unbanked customers and workers needing immediate check cashing, bill payment, or money transfer services without a bank account. The primary caveat is that while check cashing and ATM services are legitimate financial utilities, payday loans represent high-cost short-term borrowing and should be considered only for genuine emergencies, not as a regular credit solution.
services: Porte Mobile Banking Account (FDIC-insured via Pathward)
Flare Account Online Banking (FDIC-insured via Pathward)
ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Debit Card
MoneyGram Money Transfers (domestic and international to 200+ countries)
ATM Services (cash withdrawal, balance inquiry, card loading)
Bill Payment Services (rent, utilities, credit cards)
